briefdescription.para: Additional displacement threshold (px) after Pan is recognized.
True while this ScrollView owns the touch sequence.
True for one cycle when interception first begins (prevents double HandleEvent feed)
True once PanGestureDetector fires STARTED; waiting for post-recognition threshold.
Screen position at Pan STARTED, used to measure post-recognition displacement.
Scroll bar for visual indication of scroll position.
Adjusts movement based on scroll direction.
Adjusts delta to stay within bounds.
Adjusts scroll position to valid range.
Gets scroll position for a child view.
Converts content position to scroll position.
Checks if scrolling is in progress.
Gets the minimum duration of fling scroll animation.
Sets the minimum duration of fling scroll animation.
Gets the maximum duration of fling scroll animation.
Sets the maximum duration of fling scroll animation.
Scrolls to the specified child view.
Scrolls to the specified X position.
Scrolls to the specified Y position.
Gets the vertical scroll bar visibility.
Sets the vertical scroll bar visibility.
Gets the horizontal scroll bar visibility.
Sets the horizontal scroll bar visibility.
Intercepts touch events before children receive them.

detaileddescription.para: Feeds the raw touch to the PanGestureDetector via HandleEvent and tracks cumulative displacement. Returns true (steals touch from children) once the displacement exceeds mPanThreshold, ensuring scroll works even when children consume touch events.

briefdescription.para: Handles touch events on the ScrollView after interception.

detaileddescription.para: Called for subsequent events once OnInterceptTouch has returned true. Feeds each event to the PanGestureDetector via HandleEvent.

briefdescription.para: Handles mouse wheel events for scrolling.
Callback for content position change (during animation).

detaileddescription.para: Manually propagates the new direction to the ScrollBar, which is a STANDALONE child and therefore excluded from the automatic ApplyLayoutDirection traversal.

briefdescription.para: This is the internal implementation class for ScrollView.

detaileddescription.para: ScrollViewImpl extends ViewImpl and provides pan gesture detection for scrolling content, based on OneUI Scrollable component design.
